lastReleaseMessage: M5 (partial): importer registry. chase-csv + amex-csv + statement-text presets.

barRaise.topFinding: The 2026-05-26 drain landed cleanly. Ten of eleven prior action items are closed in code with regression tests behind the load-bearing ones (loopback bind, BackupFailedError contract, error_log shape, pruneIfDue gate, rules-engine matching, forecast/swaps/money-left/core math, outlier classifier). The four heaviest analytics functions flagged a day ago as untested now each have a focused vitest. The one outstanding item is orchestration: `audit-yab-daily` is still not registered in Windows Task Scheduler, so the canonical-audit report has been frozen at `docs/CANONICAL_AUDIT-2026-05-23.md` for four days. Re-register that task and the audit loop is whole again.
